catalog_entry.summary: This document is a Product User Manual for IBI_MULTIYEAR_PHY_005_002, detailing the Atlantic-Iberian Biscay Irish Ocean Physics Reanalysis Product from MERCATOR OCEAN INTERNATIONAL.
